full_text:
Xiao Jian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiao Jianwas born in Donghai. Gave five fine horses as tribute to Lü Bu, defeated by Zang Ba. Xiao Jian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Lu Bu.
